problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
